name: canshare-tnm8-gist-ct
title: NZ AJCC (8th edition) gastrointestinal stromal tumour clinical T category
description: A clinical tumour stage (cT) of a gastrointestinal stromal tumour (GIST) before initiation of treatment, using chapter 43 of the AJCC cancer staging manual (8th edition).
